scenes.name: Title
scenes.text: Canva AI for <emphasis>education</emphasis>. [pause] Polished classroom visuals — without design skills.

scenes.name: What it is
scenes.text: Canva is an online design platform. [pause] Its AI suite — called <emphasis>Magic Studio</emphasis> — generates the visual work, so you focus on the pedagogy.

scenes.name: Free for teachers
scenes.text: <emphasis>Canva for Education</emphasis> is free for verified teachers and students. [pause] Sign up at canva.com slash education with your school email.

scenes.name: Magic Studio
scenes.text: Inside, the tools you will use most. [pause] Magic Design builds whole decks. Magic Write drafts text. Text-to-image creates illustrations. Background remover and layout suggestions polish the rest.

scenes.name: Workflow
scenes.text: Every Canva AI project follows the same five steps.

scenes.name: Best uses
scenes.text: Where it earns its keep. [pause] Lesson decks. Worksheets. Posters. Infographics. Certificates. Newsletters. Each one in minutes, not hours.

scenes.name: Caution
scenes.text: AI visuals can look impressive and still be wrong. [pause] Review every slide. Check facts, age-appropriateness, and cultural fit before students see it.
